vibe: High-contrast, bold, approachably technical, fun, stark geometry with pastel pops.

global_rules.contrast_strategy: High contrast black and white core, accented by solid, flat pastel blocks (Mint, Yellow, Lavender) to indicate interactive zones or categories.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:bg-pastel_yellow hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3
buttons.pill: rounded-full px-4 py-2 border-2 border-black font-mono text-sm shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] bg-white hover:bg-pastel_pink transition-colors

cards.tool_card: bg-white border-2 border-black p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] flex flex-col gap-4 relative transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]
cards.roast_card: bg-black text-white border-2 border-danger p-8 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_#EF4444]

inputs.search: w-full border-4 border-black px-6 py-4 text-xl font-bold focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:bg-pastel_yellow shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-colors placeholder:text-zinc-400

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b-4 border-black py-4

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must compress their hard shadows and translate slightly (X and Y) to simulate being pressed.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee with Bricolage Grotesque text-4xl or larger for Trending Tools and Roasting sections. Hard border top and bottom.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Minimal. Keep it punchy and instantaneous to match the brutalist aesthetic.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react, bold variants (strokeWidth={2.5}) where possible, or use standard strokes but large sizes.

hero_illustration.alt: 3D isometric illustration of a stack of software tools, boxes, and gears, vibrant neo-brutalist style
hero_illustration.usage: Hero section dominant visual, floating slightly to the side or above the search bar.

abstract_bg_1.usage: Use selectively inside Collection cards or topic headers as a textured background with mix-blend-mode or low opacity.

specific_page_instructions.hero: Center heavy search bar. Below it, 'Goal Chips' (e.g., 'Deploy NextJS', 'Free Database') as clickable pills. Use the hero_illustration as an overlapping graphic.
specific_page_instructions.dead_tool_detector: Two-pane layout. Left: stark input for paid tool URL. Right: Result card rendering in a pastel_mint box.
specific_page_instructions.stack_generator: Chat interface but stark and blocky. No soft bubbles. Square cards for generated tools.
specific_page_instructions.repo_translator: Input GitHub URL. The output must parse technical jargon into a massive, friendly, plain-English paragraph in the 'h3' font.
specific_page_instructions.roast_my_stack: Aggressive visual shift. Black background, red accents. The roast text should be large, maybe using a monospace font for maximum terminal-vibe impact.
specific_page_instructions.collections_page: Grid of massive cards. Each card has a different pastel background color and huge typography.
specific_page_instructions.browse_topics: Bento grid (tetris mode). Mixing squares and wide rectangles.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
